AVF and ring cyclotrons at Research
Focal plane counter system consists of two Vertical
Drift Chambers (VDCs). The efficiency of each plane of
VDCs was estimated to be better than 90%, and the
overall systematic uncertainties in the normalization
were estimated to be less than 5%.
